headline: Uber has always wanted to be more than a ride; now it has reason to hurry
summary: The company has been trying to embed itself inside the AV industry — as a data provider, an investor, and a distribution platform — but the consumer-facing bet may be just as important.

headline: Morgan Stanley outlines 5 key themes across the gig economy
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley identified five thematic trends across the gig economy following simultaneous earnings from DoorDash Inc (NASDAQ:DASH), Uber Technologies Inc (NYSE:UBER) and Instacart (NASDAQ:CART), while raising its Snap price target 8% to $7.

headline: Even Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi Can't Crack 4.9 Rider Rating — Here's What He's Doing To Fix It
summary: Uber CEO Khosrowshahi's passenger score is 4.83, below average of 4.89. He aims for 4.9, using tips and etiquette to improve.
